name: PowerShell ADRecon Execution
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bhabesh Raj
SIGMA Title: PowerShell ADRecon Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of ADRecon.ps1 for AD reconnaissance which has been reported to be actively used by FIN7

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(Message) LIKE '%function get-adrexcelcomob%' OR LOWER(Message) LIKE '%get-adrgpo%' OR LOWER(Message) LIKE '%get-adrdomaincontroller%' OR LOWER(Message) LIKE '%adrecon-report.xlsx%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY PowerShell ADRecon Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(Message) LIKE '%function get-adrexcelcomob%' OR LOWER(Message) LIKE '%get-adrgpo%' OR LOWER(Message) LIKE '%get-adrdomaincontroller%' OR LOWER(Message) LIKE '%adrecon-report.xlsx%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Bhabesh Raj SIGMA Title: PowerShell ADRecon Execution SIGMA Description: Detects execution of ADRecon.ps1 for AD reconnaissance which has been reported to be actively used by FIN7  False positives: - Unknown  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
